span.p:
Admin Panel
✅ JWT Token Storage
✅ Auto Logout

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Game Interface
✅ Input Validation
✅ CSP Headers

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Input Validator
✅ Username sanitization
✅ Numeric range checks

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Authentication
✅ JWT with expiry
✅ bcrypt hashing

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
/api/admin-auth
✅ bcrypt + JWT
✅ Rate Limited
✅ Timing-safe compare

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
/api/submit-score
✅ Input Validation
✅ Rate Limited
✅ Sanitized Output

span.p:
Audit Logger
✅ All admin actions
✅ IP tracking

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Error Monitor
✅ Sentry integration
✅ Sanitized logs

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Security Monitor
✅ Failed auth attempts
✅ Rate limit violations
